description_long: This guard rail consists of two robust, square concrete posts with pointed pyramid-shaped tops, connected by a horizontal rail. The posts are light gray and have a weathered, slightly stained appearance, suggesting exposure to outdoor elements. The central rail is a long, rectangular slab with a rough, mottled surface, predominantly black with patches of white, indicating either paint wear or corrosion. The posts are mounted on square bases, providing stability and anchoring the structure to the ground. The overall design is utilitarian, intended to serve as a physical barrier for vehicles or pedestrians in urban environments. The ends of the rail are blunt, with no visible energy-absorbing or flared treatments.
description: A weathered concrete and metal guard rail with two pointed posts and a mottled black-and-white central rail, designed for urban barriers.
description_view_0: Front view showing both pointed concrete posts and the full length of the black-and-white rail.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of one post and the narrow edge of the rail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the posts and the mostly black, worn surface of the rail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other post and the rail's edge.
